strengths: Completed both outbound and return transfer phases successfully
Maintained reasonable completion time despite object recovery
Demonstrated ability to recover from dropped object incidents
weaknesses: Lost control of one object causing it to leave the field of view
Time penalty from object recovery affected overall efficiency

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on secure grasp before release
drills.targets_weakness: Lost control of one object causing it to leave the field of view

drills.name: Lost-object recovery awareness
drills.description: Perform slow-motion transfer sets emphasizing stable release and regrasp angle to prevent drops

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Complete the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping to improve efficiency
drills.targets_weakness: Time penalty from object recovery affected overall efficiency

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your successful completion ability into more consistent object control. Work on preventing drops rather than just recovering from them to improve both speed and reliability.
